ingredients: Chicken breast, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, herbs
instructions: Marinate chicken in lemon juice, oil, garlic, and herbs. Grill until cooked through.
description: A healthy, high-protein grilled chicken dish with a zesty lemon herb flavor.

ingredients: Quinoa, black beans, corn, bell peppers, avocado, lime
instructions: Cook quinoa. Mix with beans, corn, peppers. Top with avocado and lime juice.
description: A filling vegetarian bowl packed with fiber and plant-based protein.

ingredients: Salmon fillet, asparagus, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions: Place salmon and asparagus on baking sheet. Drizzle with oil, season, and bake at 400F for 15 mins.
description: Rich in omega-3s, this simple salmon dish is both nutritious and delicious.

ingredients: Firm tofu, broccoli, soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger, garlic
instructions: Press and cube tofu. Stir-fry with broccoli, ginger, and garlic. Add soy sauce and sesame oil.
description: A quick, vegan-friendly stir-fry perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients: Rolled oats, almond milk, mixed berries, sliced almonds, honey
instructions: Cook oats in almond milk. Top with berries, almonds, and a drizzle of honey.
description: A heart-healthy breakfast that keeps you full all morning.

ingredients: Lean ground beef, zucchini, bell peppers, onions, tomato sauce
instructions: Brown beef with onions. Add chopped veggies and tomato sauce. Simmer until tender.
description: A low-carb, high-protein skillet meal loaded with vegetables.

ingredients: Lentils, carrots, celery, onions, vegetable broth, tomatoes
instructions: Sauté veggies. Add lentils, broth, and tomatoes. Simmer for 45 mins.
description: A comforting, high-fiber vegan soup perfect for meal prep.

ingredients: Greek yogurt, granola, strawberries, chia seeds
instructions: Layer yogurt with granola and strawberries. Top with chia seeds.
description: A protein-packed snack or breakfast with a satisfying crunch.

ingredients: Cauliflower florets, heavy cream, cheddar cheese, cream cheese
instructions: Steam cauliflower. Make a cheese sauce with cream and cheese. Combine and bake.
description: A rich, comforting keto alternative to traditional mac and cheese.

ingredients: Whole wheat bread, avocado, eggs, red pepper flakes
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado on top. Add a fried or poached egg and pepper flakes.
description: A balanced meal with healthy fats, complex carbs, and protein.
